description:
Recto: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Introduced with the phrase "your slave congratulates you, may God complete your deliverance." Refers to various commodities, including olive oil, linseed oil, soap, and their prices.

Verso: On verso there is a list in Judaeo-Arabic, previously catalogued as a list of contributors but this is not clear.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
